title: Production Quantization — AWQ, GPTQ, GGUF K-quants, FP8, MXFP4/NVFP4

questions.question: Which quantization format does the lesson call the production default for CPU and edge serving?
questions.question_zh: 本课认为 CPU 和边缘部署的生产默认量化格式是哪一种？

questions.question: Which format is the lesson's pick for datacenter GPU serving when multi-LoRA is required in vLLM?
questions.question_zh: 在 vLLM 中需要 multi-LoRA 时，本课为数据中心 GPU 推理推荐哪种格式？

questions.question: What is the "my model is 4 GB now" trap with AWQ?
questions.question_zh: AWQ 中 “我的模型现在只有 4 GB 了” 这个陷阱指的是什么？
options: AWQ does not actually shrink weights
AWQ only shrinks weights; KV cache and activations are separate and can add 30-50 GB at production batch sizes
options_zh: AWQ 与 vLLM 不兼容
AWQ 要求 INT8 的 KV cache
AWQ 实际上不会压缩权重
AWQ 只压缩权重；KV cache 和激活是独立的，在生产批次下可能再吃掉 30-50 GB

questions.question: Why does calibrating AWQ on generic web text hurt domain models?
questions.question_zh: 为什么用通用网络文本来校准 AWQ 会损害领域模型？
options: The algorithm makes wrong decisions about which weights to protect, dropping domain accuracy (for example several Pass@1 points on HumanEval)
It only works on AMD GPUs
options_zh: 算法会错判应该保护哪些权重，导致领域准确率下滑（比如 HumanEval Pass@1 掉好几个点）
只能在 AMD GPU 上工作

questions.question: For a reasoning-heavy workload where quality is non-negotiable, which precision does the lesson recommend by default?
questions.question_zh: 对于质量不容妥协的推理密集型工作负载，本课默认推荐哪种精度？

questions.question: Which 2026 quantization limitation does the lesson call out for NVFP4 in early 2026?
questions.question_zh: 本课指出 2026 年初 NVFP4 存在的哪一项量化限制？
options: Cannot be combined with FP8 KV cache
options_zh: 无法与 FP8 KV cache 一起使用
